description.ko: 백색광이 기하학적 유리 매체를 통해 근본적인 스펙트럼 색상으로 분산되는 정밀한 순간을 포착한 놀라운 광학 물리학의 시각적 탐구입니다.
description.en: A stunning visual exploration of optical physics, capturing the precise moment white light breaks into its fundamental spectral colors through a geometric glass medium.

prompt: A cinematic, hyper-realistic close-up of a multifaceted crystal prism resting on a sleek dark surface. A single, sharp beam of white light enters the glass and disperses into a vibrant, detailed rainbow spectrum across the scene. Volumetric lighting, sharp focus on the refraction point, ray tracing, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere.
